name: Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9x12 inch (9x13 inch) baking dish with butter or cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix together brown sugar, light corn syrup, melted margarine, peanut butter, and vanilla extract until well combined. The mixture should form a paste-like consistency.
4. Add the quick oats, sunflower seeds, coconut, wheat germ, raisins, carob chips, and any other nuts or dried fruits you desire to the bowl. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed and the mixture is slightly crumbly, holding together in clumps when pressed.
5. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Recipe sourced from intgrec@lims01.lerc.nasa.gov (CHRIS GREB)
